vehicle.label: Long-Range Surveillance Wing
vehicle.desc: Fixed-wing flying-wing UAV, 2m wingspan, 4+ hour endurance

parts.label: Center Body Pod
parts.spec: Flying-wing center pod, equipment bay door, wing-spar reinforcement, motor pylon at rear

parts.label: Wing Spar (2-piece)
parts.spec: 20mm CFRP main spar, 2-piece centerjoint, anti-rotation key, 800mm half-span each

parts.label: Wing Rib Set x 12
parts.spec: Wing rib NACA airfoil profile, lightening pockets, leading edge sock, trailing edge taper

parts.label: Elevon Servo Pocket x 2
parts.spec: Elevon servo pocket, MG90S or DS215MG, control horn linkage, removable access cover

parts.label: Motor + Pusher Prop Mount
parts.spec: Rear pusher 2814 BLDC mount, 10x7 folding prop clearance, thrust line +1deg down

parts.label: GPS + Pitot Boom
parts.spec: Nose boom 8mm, GPS at tip, pitot static port forward, BEC airflow shielded

parts.label: Camera Gimbal Bay
parts.spec: Forward downward camera gimbal bay 70mm deep, 2-axis micro gimbal, optical window

parts.label: Battery Bay (Slide)
parts.spec: 4S 16000mAh Li-ion slide-in bay, CG adjust slot, top access hatch, balance lead window

parts.label: Integration Service Backbone
parts.spec: Wing/fuselage integration service backbone with assembly_datum pads, harness_raceway, service_hatch, connector_keying, anti-rotation wing datum, and visible load-path inspection marks

requirements: Flying-wing center pod, equipment bay door, wing-spar reinforcement, motor pylon at rear

risk.desc: Potential misalignment due to tolerance stack-up on motor mount.

risk.desc: Potential thermal stress on servo due to heat dissipation from wing structure.
risk.mit: Implement thermal dissipation fins and ensure proper airflow around the servo.

risk.desc: Risk of cable strain during assembly and operation due to tight routing.
risk.mit: Ensure cable routing respects minimum bend radius and includes strain relief geometry.

risk.desc: Risk of misalignment during assembly due to lack of clear datum features.
risk.mit: Add primary datum features and ensure clear alignment instructions in cad_brief.

risk.desc: Risk of access cover becoming detached during flight due to insufficient fastening.
risk.mit: Increase the number of fasteners or use locking nuts on the access cover.

risk.desc: Risk of control horn breaking due to excessive preload.
risk.mit: Review preload calculations and ensure preload is within safe limits.

_subsystem_plan.subsystem_role: Slide-in li-ion battery pack bay on CG rail, BMS and connector access

physics_paths.path: Battery pack -> XT60 connector -> Power bus -> BMS -> CG rail
physics_paths.description: Power flows from the battery pack through the XT60 connector, then via the power bus to the BMS and CG rail.

physics_paths.path: Battery heat -> Top access hatch -> Ambient air
physics_paths.description: Heat generated by the battery is dissipated through the top access hatch to the ambient air.

physics_paths.path: Top access hatch -> Balance lead window -> Battery pack
physics_paths.description: Human access is provided through the top access hatch to the balance lead window for servicing the battery pack.

The maximum temperature of the battery bay must not exceed 60 degrees Celsius.
The subsystem must withstand a structural load of 3g.
